note: Canonical repo tags are normalized metadata. Gmail labels remain source_labels only.

event_clusters.label: June 2026 mediation sequence
event_clusters.description: Mediation session, follow-up scheduling, mediation summaries, and post-session position clarification.

event_clusters.label: Home preservation and urgent bills
event_clusters.description: Insurance, utilities, creditor, or service-provider records affecting preservation of home or household stability.

event_clusters.label: Legal help and intake
event_clusters.description: Lawyer intake, legal resource requests, consultation scheduling, or related preparation. Segregate from general evidence.

event_clusters.label: Timeline checkpoint
event_clusters.description: Self-sent or generated checkpoint used to preserve a dated state of a working chronology.

issue_lanes.label: Interim vehicle access
issue_lanes.description: Access to a practical vehicle before final settlement.

issue_lanes.label: Vehicle registration and liability
issue_lanes.description: Plateholder, registration, tickets, accident exposure, insurance, and vehicle-use risk.

issue_lanes.label: Home insurance
issue_lanes.description: Home insurance notices, invoices, cancellation risk, and payment correspondence.

issue_lanes.label: Family debt
issue_lanes.description: Shared or disputed family bills, debt, collection pressure, service interruption, and credit harm.

issue_lanes.label: Support calculation
issue_lanes.description: Income disclosure, support guideline inputs, and support-position correspondence.

issue_lanes.label: Asset tracing
issue_lanes.description: Settlement funds, estate funds, down payments, mortgage contributions, and vehicle-purchase tracing.

issue_lanes.label: Disability access
issue_lanes.description: Disability-related access, transportation, medical, rehabilitation, food, household, and functional-stability concerns.

issue_lanes.label: Dog access and support
issue_lanes.description: Dog access, support-animal context, exercise access, and related logistics.

issue_lanes.label: Legal consultation
issue_lanes.description: Lawyer outreach, intake, consult scheduling, and legal resource support.

issue_lanes.label: Support context
issue_lanes.description: Personal support or contemporaneous context that is not primary source-of-record evidence.
